rationale.R1.4: The agent identified a contradiction in the novelty claim and provided specific rewrites, mapping against prior works and articulating deltas clearly.
rationale.R1.7: Flagged missing citations but did not audit all load-bearing ones.
rationale.RX.1: Highlighted multiple uncertain claims and suggested hedging.
